title: July 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 7''' is the 188th day of the year (189th in leap years). There are 177 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Mo Collins]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Danny Jacobs (The Freemaker Adventures)|Danny Jacobs]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Cree Summer]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Renée Ahdieh]] is born.
*1983 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 3|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 3]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Ghost of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Episode I: Queen Amidala]]'' and ''[[Episode I: Qui-Gon Jinn]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 1|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Swamp Station Sweep]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Into Battle]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Servants of the Empire: Imperial Justice]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Dark Disciple]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Clone Army Attacketh: Star Wars Part the Second]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars Rebels: Secrets of the Rebels]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Beasts of Echo Base]]" premieres on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 6|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 6]] published.
*2021 – [[Bounty Hunters 14|''Bounty Hunters'' 14]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Hassani Shapi]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars Icons: Darth Vader]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
